subtitle.en: Vibrio fischeri bacteria release autoinducer molecules; only when density crosses a threshold does enough autoinducer bind back, switching luminescence genes on for the whole colony
subtitle.ko: Vibrio fischeri는 autoinducer를 분비 — 밀도가 임계값 넘어야 모두 동시 발광

description.en: Flask with bacteria; density slider triggers Hill-switch activation at ~10⁶ cells/mL. Foundation of Bassler's quorum-sensing discovery.
description.ko: 박테리아 플라스크; 밀도 슬라이더가 ~10⁶ cells/mL에서 Hill switch 활성. Bassler 정족수 감지 기반.
